prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为9543→10623→10917→10182→10859名，整体呈波动上移趋势，近5年累计后移约1316名；2025年基准位次约10859名，较2024年有 所后移；该校在重庆物理类招生计划2021–2024年均为60人，2025年增至66人，2026年计划67人，较2025年小幅扩招1人，扩幅约1.5%，对竞争格局影响有 限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华东理工大学是211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第42名，近年排名稳中有升（2021年第45→2026年第42），学校层次处于全国前列。2022年曾因校园安全事件出现偏负面舆情，但距今已多年；2026年声誉文件中未出现该校重大负面信号；抖音热度排名第34位（较热），综合热度约132万，短视 频曝光量处于中上水平，反映报考关注度尚可；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A+（全国顶尖），化学获评A-，控制科学与工程获评A-；王牌专业化工 与制药类对应A+学科，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类等热门专业社会热度持续偏高，但华东理工的化工类王牌专业社会热度一般；重庆2026年普通高考总人数约20.9万，按近年物理类占比约65.5%估算，物理类考生约13.69万，较2025年13.95万略降约1.85%，竞争略有缓解；省控线数据2026年缺失，未纳入 判断；华东理工大学位于上海市，对重庆考生具有一线城市地域吸引力，但上海高校整体竞争激烈，该校在重庆招生计划相对稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年 位次波动上移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+1人）、重庆物理类考生数略降、抖音热度较热及学校层次稳步提升等因素，扩招与考生减少的效应相互抵消，但上海地域吸引力 和学校排名上升对报考热度有正向作用，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准10859名基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约10988名，区间10488–11488名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间10488–11488名内，建议以二档专业（化工类王牌、机械类、数学类等）为主攻方向，一档专业（计算机类、电子信息类、智能与机器人）作为冲刺，三档专业（ 化学类、生物工程类、管理类等）作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（10488名以内）可重点冲刺一档热门专业；位次接近区间上限（11488名附近）应以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 9543 → 10623 → 10917 → 10182 → 10859, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1316 positions over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 10859, which is slightly lower than 2024; the enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing's Physics Category was 60 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 66 in 2025, and planned to be 67 in 2026, a small expansion of 1 student compared to 2025, an increase of about 1.5%, which has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: East China University of Science and Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 42nd, with a stable upward trend in recent years (from 45th in 2021 to 42nd in 2026), placing it at the forefront nationally. In 2022, there was a negative public opinion incident related to campus safety, but it has been several years since; the 2026 reputation file shows no major negative signals for this university; its Douyin popularity ranks 34th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.32 million, and short video exposure is at an upper-middle level, reflecting moderate application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A+ (top in the country), Chemistry was rated A-, and Control Science and Engineering was rated A-; the flagship major Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceutical category corresponds to the A+ discipline, which strongly attracts candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity, but the social popularity of East China University of Science and Technology's flagship Chemical Engineering major is average; the total number of regular college entrance examination students in Chongqing in 2026 is about 209,000, and based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 65.5%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 136,900, a slight decrease of about 1.85% from 139,500 in 2025, indicating a slight easing of competition; the provincial control line data for 2026 is missing and not included in the judgment; East China University of Science and Technology is located in Shanghai, which has a first-tier city regional attraction for Chongqing candidates, but overall competition among Shanghai universities is fierce, and the university's enrollment plan in Chongqing is relatively stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the fluctuating upward trend in historical rankings, the small expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+1 student), a slight decrease in the number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing, relatively high Douyin popularity, and the steady improvement of the university's level, the effects of expansion and candidate reduction offset each other, but the regional attraction of Shanghai and the rise in university ranking have a positive effect on application popularity. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 10859; the predicted minimum ranking is about 10988, with a range of 10488–11488.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 10488–11488, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (flagship Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Mathematics, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Intelligence and Robotics) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Chemistry, Bioengineering, Management, etc.) as a safety net; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 10488), focus on sprinting for popular Tier 1 majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 11488), prioritize Tier 3 majors as a safety net.
